parameters.content:
## Tax4Us WordPress Content Agent
Complete AI-powered content creation workflow for Tax4Us blog posts with SEO optimization and automated publishing.

parameters.toolDescription: Tavily SERP Results Tool for Tax4Us SEO Research

parameters.text:
=Analyze the following Tax4Us content request and generate optimized writing guidelines:

Title: {{ $json.Title }}
Description: {{ $json.Description }}
Keyword: {{ $('Set Tax4Us Fields').item.json.Keyword }}

Generate JSON output with:
- search_intent (informational/transactional/navigational/commercial)
- writing_style (professional and authoritative for tax/accounting)
- writing_tone (trustworthy and helpful for tax clients)
- target_audience (small business owners, individuals, tax professionals)
- goal_of_article (educate on tax topics, provide guidance, build trust)
- semantic_analysis (common tax subtopics and related questions)
- keywords (primary, secondary, semantic, long-tail)

Focus on Tax4Us brand voice: professional, trustworthy, helpful for tax and accounting needs.

options.systemMessage: You are a Tax4Us content strategist specializing in tax and accounting content. Generate writing guidelines that align with Tax4Us brand: professional, trustworthy, and helpful for tax clients and small business owners.
You are an expert in crafting SEO-optimized titles for Tax4Us content. Focus on professional, trustworthy titles that appeal to tax clients and small business owners.

parameters.text:
=Create key takeaways for Tax4Us content:

Title: {{ $json.new_title }}
Keyword: {{ $('Set Tax4Us Fields').item.json.Keyword }}
Target Audience: {{ $('Tax4Us Content Analysis').item.json.target_audience }}

Generate key takeaways that:
- Provide valuable tax insights
- Help small business owners and individuals
- Build trust in Tax4Us expertise
- Are actionable and practical
- Use professional but accessible language

Format as markdown with intro, bullet points, and outro.

options.systemMessage: You are a Tax4Us content expert. Create key takeaways that provide valuable tax insights while building trust and demonstrating expertise.

parameters.text:
=Write an engaging introduction for Tax4Us content:

Title: {{ $json.new_title }}
Keyword: {{ $('Set Tax4Us Fields').item.json.Keyword }}
Key Takeaways: {{ $json.key_takeaways }}

Create an introduction that:
- Hooks tax clients and small business owners
- Establishes Tax4Us expertise
- Explains why the topic matters
- Uses professional but accessible language
- Transitions smoothly to the main content

Keep it concise (2-3 paragraphs) and avoid generic phrases.

options.systemMessage: You are a Tax4Us content writer. Create introductions that hook readers while establishing Tax4Us as a trusted tax expert.
You are a Tax4Us content strategist. Create outlines that thoroughly cover tax topics while providing practical value to clients.
You are a Tax4Us content writer. Write professional, trustworthy content that provides practical tax guidance while demonstrating expertise.

parameters.text:
=Write a conclusion for Tax4Us content:

Main Body: {{ $json['main body'] }}
Title: {{ $json.new_title }}

Create a conclusion that:
- Summarizes key tax insights
- Reinforces Tax4Us value
- Provides a clear next step
- Maintains professional tone
- Encourages engagement
- Ends with a compelling thought

Keep it concise (100-150 words) and avoid generic phrases.

options.systemMessage: You are a Tax4Us content writer. Write conclusions that summarize key insights while reinforcing Tax4Us as a trusted tax partner.
You are a Tax4Us content assembler. Create cohesive articles that maintain professional, trustworthy Tax4Us brand voice.

parameters.text:
=Perform final edit on Tax4Us content:

{{ $json.output }}

Enhance the article to near-perfect quality while:
- Maintaining Tax4Us professional brand voice
- Expanding depth where needed
- Strengthening transitions
- Adding industry-specific examples
- Ensuring logical flow
- Optimizing for tax clients and small business owners
- Keeping content trustworthy and helpful

Output the refined article without commentary.

options.systemMessage: You are a Tax4Us content editor. Enhance articles to near-perfect quality while maintaining professional, trustworthy Tax4Us brand voice.
